name: Mrs Fields Marbles
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F (150°C).
2. In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. Set aside.
4. In a large bowl using an electric mixer on medium speed, combine sugars. Add butter and beat until the batter is grainy.
5. Add egg, sour cream, and vanilla; beat at medium speed until light and fluffy.
6. Scrape the bowl. Gradually add the flour mixture, blending at low speed until just combined. Do not overmix.
7. Melt chocolate:
- Place chocolate chips in a double boiler over hot (but not boiling) water, stirring constantly until melted.
- OR, microwave chocolate, stirring every 20 seconds until melted.
8. Cool chocolate for a few minutes and pour into the cookie batter using a wooden spoon or rubber spatula. Lightly fold to combine without mixing completely.
9. Drop rounded teaspoons of batter (about 2 tablespoons) onto ungreased cookie sheets, spacing about 2 inches apart.
10. Bake for 23-25 minutes, or until set but not browned.
11. Quickly transfer cookies to a cool surface.
